results.title: Spark.work
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# Spark.work

Spark.work is a Software Development company. Spark.work is an integrated HR platform created to transform both HR and employee work routines for small to medium-sized companies. Spark.work employs 18 people (+5.0% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Yerevan, Armenia, with presence in Colombia, Ukraine, and United States.

## About
Spark is a comprehensive people and strategy management platform designed to empower not only HR teams but also company executives. By offering a holistic view of workforce dynamics, Spark facilitates strategic decision-making, enhances operational efficiency, and fosters a more engaged and productive workforce. It's not just about managing people management processes—it's about driving company-wide clarity, alignment, and success.

## Company Details
- Industry: Software Development
- Type: Privately Held
- Headquarters: Yerevan, Armenia
- Founded Year: 2019
- Homepage: spark.work
- Status: active
- Aliases: spark.work
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/spark-work
- Linkedin Followers: 2,846 (Monthly: +2.3%)
- Emails: contact@spark.work
- Phone: +37455653937

## Workforce
- Employees: 18 (11-50 employees)
 - Monthly Growth: +5.0%
 - Yearly Growth: +5.0%
- Key Executives:
 - Artur Torosyan: Chief Technology Officer
 - Sergey Chobanyan: Chief Financial Officer
 - Armen Kocharyan: Chief Executive Officer
- Breakdown:
 - By Country: Armenia: 12 (57%), Colombia: 3 (14%), Ukraine: 2 (10%), United States: 1 (5%)
 - By Department: Technical: 4 (19%), Customer Service: 3 (14%), General Management: 3 (14%), Other Department: 3 (14%), Marketing: 2 (10%), Administrative: 1 (5%), Project Management: 1 (5%), Research: 1 (5%)
 - By Seniority: Specialist: 10 (48%), C-Level: 3 (14%), Manager: 2 (10%), Other Management: 2 (10%), Head: 1 (5%)
- Talent Sources: Joomag (1), ArmenITa (1), SOROBAN-UKRAINE (1), ProductMix (1), Armenian Code Academy (1), V-Mobile (1), Yerevan State University (1), NOSHN (1), CodeSignal (1), VOLO | Software Development Company (15)
- Alumni Go To: FilingRamp (1), VOLO | Software Development Company (7), Armenian Lifelong Learning League (1), Loopex Digital (1), Digitain Armenia (1), Sardina Systems (1), ServiceTitan (1)

## Products & Technology
- Features: Free Trial
- Tech Stack: asp, well, medium
- Scale ($5.00): 50 Users Per Month
- Starter ($1.50): 50 Users Per Month
- Pro ($10.00): 50 Users Per Month

## Web Presence
- Monthly Visits: 4,666
 - Traffic Growth: Monthly: +0.0%
- Global Rank: #4,190,707
- Bounce Rate: 0.4%
- Pages per Visit: 1.4
- Top Countries: United States: 47%, United Arab Emirates: 20%, United Kingdom: 16%, Germany: 11%, France: 5%

## Categories
hr platform, core hr software, spark.work, core hr, human resources management platform, human resources management software, talent acquisition software, onboarding hr solution, offboarding hr solution, employee management, time-off management, onboarding and offboarding, hr reporting, performance management, hr soft

results.title: HR.com
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# HR.com (HR.COM Limited)

HR.com is a Human Resources Services company. HR.com is the largest community of HR Pros offering HR training, Webcasts, Events, HR compliance, HR certification, HRCI & SHRM cert prep, HR Research, HR Tools & Resources. HR.com employs 165 people (-4.3% YoY, -13 people) and has an annual revenue of $14.0M, founded in 1999. Headquartered in Canada, operates in 12 countries (including United States, India, Philippines, Pakistan, and United Kingdom).

## About
About HR.com

HR.com, the largest network of HR professionals, is committed to helping HR professionals advance and build meaningful careers and find the optimal solutions to enhance their job performance. 

With products and resources rooted in education, research, and leveraging cutting-edge technology, we help at every career stage - and over 2 million HR pros agree! (How could that many people be wrong?) By delivering best-in-class learning products, 500+ annual webcasts, 50+ world-class events, monthly HR-themed magazines, and innovative and thought-provoking research through the HR Research Institute, HR.com strives to inspire and strengthen workforces to change the world. 

HR.com also offers the most comprehensive HR certification exam preparation and guarantees a passing score on all SHRM and HRCI certification exams. Technology and experience drive our customized solutions that will help you become the best and most successful version of yourself. Learn more at www.HR.com and maximize your potential.

## Company Details
- Industry: Human Resources Services
- Type: Privately Held
- Founded Year: 1999
- Homepage: hr.com
- Status: active
- Ownership: Private
- Aliases: hr.com, hr.com limited
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/hr-com
- Linkedin Followers: 66,344 (Monthly: +0.3%, Yearly: +2.6%)
- Emails: info@hr.com
- Phone: 877-472-6648, +1 905 727 1340
- SIC Codes: 27, 274
- NAICS Codes: 51, 519

## Financials
- Annual Revenue: USD 14,000,000

## Workforce
- Employees: 165 (51-200 employees)
 - Monthly Growth: -0.7%
 - Yearly Growth: -4.3%
- Key Executives:
 - Amy Niras: Regional Sales Director
 - Sharilene Rowland: Account Partner
 - Pamela Koller: Regional Sales Director
 - Sharilene Rowland: HR Business Partner
 - Mohammad Abdi: Human Resources Business Partner
 - Debbie Mcgrath: Owner, HR.com
 - Rose Donato: Regional Account Director
- Breakdown:
 - By Country: United States: 61 (21%), Canada: 53 (18%), India: 36 (12%), Philippines: 4 (1%), Pakistan: 3 (1%), United Kingdom: 2 (1%) (+6 more)
 - By Department: Other Department: 79 (27%), General Management: 20 (7%), Sales: 12 (4%), Technical: 10 (3%), Hr: 9 (3%), Research: 9 (3%), Marketing: 8 (3%), Consulting: 6 (2%), Customer Service: 5 (2%), Product: 4 (1%) (+5 more)
 - By Seniority: Specialist: 84 (29%), Other Management: 64 (22%), Manager: 13 (4%), Director: 3 (1%), Partner: 2 (1%), Senior: 2 (1%), Vp: 2 (1%) (+1 more)
- Salary Ranges:
 - Genome Analyst: INR 350,000/year
 - Product Manager: CAD 45,368/year

results.title: Spark.work I People & Strategy Management Software
results.text:
Spark.work I People & Strategy Management Software

From HRMS to Strategy Execution Software

The line between HRMS and strategy execution software is disappearing as organizations demand real alignment between people, performance, and business outcomes.

From HRMS to Strategy Execution Software

The line between HRMS and strategy execution software is disappearing as organizations demand real alignment between people, performance, and business outcomes.

Empowering 4K+ HR leaders & employees

# AI-Powered HR + Strategy Management Software

Helping companies win through clarity and alignment.

Request a Demo

5.0 on G2

4.9 on Captera

5.0 on iOS & Google Play

Trusted by High-Performing Teams

key features

key features

Strategy Management

HRMS

Spark AI

Strategy Management

## Execute Strategy with Precision

OKRs

Set goals that inspire action and track measurable results across every level.

Balanced Scorecard View performance through financial, customer, process, and learning perspectives.

KPIs & Goal Tracking

Define what matters most and monitor progress in real time.

Company Culture Keep your people connected with a shared space that brings your workplace identity to life.

Reporting & Analitics

Turn data into clear insights that drive smarter decisions.

Strategy Maps Visualize how goals, KPIs, and initiatives connect to your strategy.

Initiatives

Turn strategy into action with clear, trackable projects that drive real results.

Lead Your Organization with Clarity

Give your teams the visibility they need to win.

Explore Strategy Management

HRMS

## Clarity and Control Across Every HR Process

Applicant Tracking System

Streamline hiring from posting to onboarding with smart, collaborative workflows.

Time & Attendance Management Track hours, leaves, and schedules effortlessly for better visibility and accuracy.

Reviews and Appraisals

Simplify evaluations, align goals, and turn feedback into measurable growth.

HR Data & Reporting

Access real-time insights and make informed decisions with unified, reliable data.

Employee Self-Service

Empower employees to manage their own data, requests, and documents anytime.

Surveys & Engagement Tools

Listen, measure, and act on employee feedback to strengthen engagement and culture.

Empower Your HR Team to Do Their Best Work

Empower your team to drive real change.

Explore the HRMS Suite

Spark AI

## AI That Understands Your Organization

Core HR Agent

Understands your workforce in context, connecting people data, roles, and structures for smoother operations and smarter decisions.

Recruitment Agent

Finds and recommends the best candidates using predictive insights to shorten hiring time and improve results.

OKR Agent

Your AI helper for setting, tracking, and achieving OKRs.

Growth Agent

Identifies skill gaps, learning needs, and career opportunities, helping people grow

results.title: SPARK Matrix™: Human Capital Management (HCM) Suite for Large Businesses, Q4 2024 | UKG
results.text:
SPARK Matrix™: Human Capital Management (HCM) Suite for Large Businesses, Q4 2024 | UKG

## UKG is setting the standard in HCM for large businesses

The SPARK Matrix: Human Capital Management (HCM) Suite for Large Businesses, Q4 2024 by QKS Group — a leading global advisory and research firm — provides a detailed analysis of 19 HCM providers as well as market dynamics, the vendor landscape, and competitive positioning. Evaluations are based on requisite capabilities, including core HR, advanced talent management, payroll management, time and attendance management, employee self-service, recruitment, onboarding, benefits administration, compliance management, reporting and analytics, and mobile accessibility. UKG is positioned as a Leader for high ratings in Customer Impact and Technology Excellence and is recognized for key differentiators such as:

Great Place To Work

Great Place To Work® gives leaders and organizations the tools, insights, recognition, and resources to create a great employee experience.

UKG One View

UKG One View™ provides multinational organizations the tools to manage complexity, meet compliance requirements, increase efficiencies, and access payroll information across countries in a single place.

UKG Bryte

UKG Bryte™ is an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered assistant embedded throughout our solutions that uses generative AI to guide employees, people managers, and HR leaders.

This report from QKS Group offers comprehensive insights into the HCM landscape and is a valuable resource for selecting the ideal vendor for your organization while also highlighting why UKG is a premier HCM provider for enterprise organizations.

Evaluations are based on requisite capabilities, including core HR, advanced talent management, payroll management, time and attendance management, employee self-service, recruitment, onboarding, benefits administration, compliance management, reporting and analytics, and mobile accessibility. UKG Bryte UKG Bryte™ is an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered assistant embedded throughout our solutions that uses generative AI to guide employees, people managers, and HR leaders. results.title: How to Buy HR Software: Tips for Selecting the Right Hiring Tools | Spark Hire
results.text:
How to Buy HR Software: Tips for Selecting the Right Hiring Tools | Spark HireSkip to main contentSkip to footer
Spark Hire
The Speed to Hire Show# How to Buy HR Software: Tips for Selecting the Right Hiring Tools
**Watch Snackable Clips**Episode Resources
###### Guest Info
Single Neutral Streamline Icon: https://streamlinehq.comsingle-neutralPhil Strazzulla
Building 1 Streamline Icon: https://streamlinehq.comSelectSoftware Reviews
###### Industry
Consulting Services, Tech and Software
###### Company Size
11-50
###### Solution
Meet
Select Software Reviews is a dedicated platform offering unbiased assessments and insights into Select Software’s products and services. It’s a valuable resource for businesses and decision-makers seeking real-world feedback from users who’ve implemented Select Software solutions. The platform prioritizes transparency and credibility, providing detailed reviews, ratings, and testimonials to aid prospective customers in making informed decisions about adopting these technologies.
Phil Strazzulla, Founder of Software Select Reviews, is a visionary entrepreneur who has significantly impacted the software evaluation landscape. With a passion for technology and a deep understanding of business needs, Phil set out to make reliable software information accessible to all. He created a community-driven platform through Software Select Reviews where users confidently navigate software selection complexities. Phil’s leadership prioritizes transparency and authenticity, ensuring that each review reflects genuine user experiences. His innovative approach revolutionizes how businesses make crucial software decisions, empowering them to excel in a digital world.
This Episode of The Speed to Hire Show Features Phil Strazzulla, Founder of Software Select.
#### Key Takeaways:
* **[4:50] How are HR and TA teams prioritizing tech stack consolidation**– Opting for an all-in-one HR tech suite is often more cost-effective and streamlines data analysis for companies with fewer than a thousand employees. Many vendors are now integrating HRIS, ATS, and payroll features into unified systems, simplifying processes.
* **[7:09] Core drivers of HR tech stack consolidation**– Budget constraints are a common challenge as HR is often viewed as a cost center. Prioritize HR and TA tech solutions that are user-friendly for both HR professionals and employees. Look for vendors offering well-integrated tools that are robust, rather than focusing solely on cross-selling additional features.
* **[9:18] Navigating the applications of AI in HR tech**– When assessing vendors, prioritize grasping their philosophy and strategy for AI integration. Seek detailed plans over mere buzzwords, and contemplate how their approach will progress and enhance value in the coming years.
* **[12:17] Where to start when considering new HR tech**–
